phase-plan.purpose: Define a production-grade content delivery pipeline for Unreal DLC consumption: generated packs from Space Explorer/content editor are downloadable, verifiable, and importable through a dedicated Unreal plugin workflow.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: pipeline architecture, transport contracts, schema/asset alignment fixes, plugin integration boundaries, secrets-handling policy, CI/CD validation gates, rollback strategy. Out of scope: full Unreal runtime implementation and marketplace release packaging in this initial planning slice.

file.description: Register Phase 52 and dependency chain from phases 50/51.
Track phase execution tasks and ownership.
Git submodule hosting Unreal integration/plugin implementation.
Reference authoring mutation surface that will emit canonical pack artifacts.
Feature-flag baseline that should be extended for Unreal delivery rollout gates.

task.description: Define canonical content-pack transport contract for Unreal (manifest versioning, compatibility matrix, integrity/signature fields, dependency graph).
Define schema/asset alignment remediation plan between Space Explorer output and plugin import model (IDs, inheritance, canonical asset references, migration strategy).
Define secrets policy for docs-site + plugin workflow using encrypted serialized env artifacts (local decrypt for dev/CI only; no plaintext checked in).
Define CI/CD lane: build/sign/publish packs from docs-site and import/validate smoke in Unreal plugin repo.

questions.question: Do we sign pack manifests only, or full payload chunks + manifest hash chain?
Primary pack distribution endpoint: GitHub Releases, S3/Supabase, or dual-publish with immutable version index?
Should plugin import on editor-time only first, or support runtime fetch/load in packaged builds in phase 52 scope?

decision.summary: Use `plugins/DB_Unreal_DLC_Plugin` git submodule as authoritative Unreal integration workspace linked from this repo.
decision.impact: Enables independent plugin iteration with explicit commit pinning from the docs/content pipeline repo.

decision.summary: Start with contract-first pipeline planning before feature-heavy Unreal implementation.
decision.impact: Reduces rework by locking schema/asset compatibility and delivery guarantees before deep plugin coding.

suggestion.gap: REQUIREMENTS do not currently define a platform contract for external engine ingestion of content packs.
suggestion.proposal: Add a requirement for a versioned content delivery contract (manifest schema, compatibility matrix, integrity verification, rollback semantics) consumable by Unreal plugin workflows.

suggestion.gap: No explicit requirement ties Space Explorer canonical assets to deterministic import behavior in external runtimes.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement for schema/asset alignment tests that compare docs-site generated assets against Unreal plugin import expectations across migrations.

suggestion.gap: Secret management policy is implicit and not enforceable across docs-site and plugin repos.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement for encrypted env serialization workflow (local/CI decrypt only) with key-rotation and no plaintext secret artifacts committed.
